title: metrosideros aspera
intro: Metrosideros aspera, also known as the New Zealand horsetail or New Zealand horsetail tree, is a plant species native to New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Metrosideros aspera include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Metrosideros aspera typically involve decoctions or infusions of the plant's leaves or bark, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or topical creams for medicinal purposes.
